productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Light Winter Blue Tshirts
description: CompositionIndigo blue pique polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has short sleeves, ribbed collar and cuffs with black tipping, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, white stitch detailing along the side seams, rugged chest placket, brand badge appliqued on the upper left chest, dragon seal appliqued on the right sleeve, numered badge on the right hem and vented hemsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your sophisticated style with this indigo blue polo neck t-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The appliqued brand  badge, number tab and dragon seal adds interesting elements to this t-shirt, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
